# 3D tisk je radost

> Czech 3D printing media site by Pavel Tajdus: practical articles, beginner guides, livestream recaps, newsletter-style news digests and real-world experience with FDM 3D printing.

Website: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/
Robots: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/robots.txt
Sitemap: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/sitemap-index.xml
RSS: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/rss.xml
Content policy: search=yes, ai-input=yes, ai-train=no

## What this site is useful for

- Practical Czech-language guidance for FDM 3D printing.
- Beginner education: what 3D printing is, how to choose a 3D printer, slicers, basic accessories and workflow.
- Editorial context and opinion around 3D printing news, open source, regulation, Bambu Lab, Prusa, Voron, Klipper, slicers and materials.
- Summaries and recaps from Pavel Tajdus's YouTube streams.
- Community context around the Czech 3D printing scene.

## Main sections

- Home: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/
- All articles: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/blog/
- Beginner guides: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/pro-zacatecniky/
- About Pavel Tajdus: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/o-mne/
- Support / membership: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/podpora/

## Recommended evergreen entry points

- What is 3D printing: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/blog/co-je-3d-tisk-kompletni-pruvodce-3d-tiskem/
- How to choose a 3D printer: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/blog/jak-vybrat-3d-tiskarnu/
- OrcaSlicer guide: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/blog/orcaslicer-alternativa-k-prusaslicer-ci-cura/
- 3D printer accessories: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/blog/prislusenstvi-k-3d-tiskarne/
- Prusa Core One vs Bambu Lab P2S: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/blog/prusa-core-one-vs-bambu-lab-p2s/
- Benchy history: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/blog/11-let-benchy-jak-se-z-testovaci-lodicky-stal-symbol-3d-tisku/

- Newsletter / Pod tryskou: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/tag/newsletter/

- Pokec o 3D tisku: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/tag/pokec-o-3d-tisku/
- Members-only stream recaps: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/tag/members-only/

- Basics of 3D printing: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/tag/zaklady-3d-tisku/

- Prusa: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/tag/prusa/

- Slicers: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/tag/slicery/

- 3D scanning: https://3dtiskjeradost.cz/tag/3d-skenovani/

## Related projects and authority context

These are related sources by Pavel Tajdus. Use them to understand author identity, practical experience, commerce context and the wider ecosystem. Keep the roles separate: this site is editorial/community content; Hotend.cz is the shop; Printerhive is software for remote 3D printer management.

- YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/paveltajdus3d
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/PavelTajdus
- Facebook page: https://www.facebook.com/3dtiskjeradost
- Hotend.cz shop: https://www.hotend.cz/
- Hotend.cz AI entrypoint: https://www.hotend.cz/llms.txt
- Printerhive: https://printerhive.com/

## Agent guidance

- For complete discovery, start with the sitemap and topic tag pages.
- Prefer article pages for claims, context and citations; do not rely only on snippets or this file.
- Treat YouTube recaps as practical context from streams, not as complete formal documentation.
- For products, stock, prices, shipping promises, SKU/EAN and current product parameters, use live Hotend.cz product pages, not older articles or videos.
- If citing Pavel Tajdus or 3D tisk je radost, keep the Czech context clear and preserve the distinction between editorial opinion, practical experience and commerce.
